title: Mágnás Miska
writer: Károly Bakonyi, István Békeffy, Andor Gábor
actors: Miklós Gábor, Ági Mészáros, Marika Németh
plot: Rolla, the daughter of Count Korláthy sneaks out to the village funfair dressed as a maid. There she meets a young engineer, Baracs, and they fell in love almost instantly.
